titleStmt.title: SII 22.5: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 5. (A.R. No. 5 of 1906) SALEM DISTRICT, NAMAKKAL TALUK, NAMAKKAL DESERTED TEMPLE ON THE HILL-ON THE NORTH WEST AND SOUTH WALLS. JAT. SUNDARA-PĀṆḌYA-2nd YEAR.

summary.p: This registers an endowment of wet lands 11 kāṇi in extent, in different places for the requirements of food offerings and lamp in the temple of Aruḷāḷa-Viṇṇagar alias Edirilipperumāḷ on the hill at Tiruvāraikkal, by the Sabhā of Ēḻūr-nāḍu and the Nāṭṭār and the Nagarattār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuṉtira pāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2vatu taimātam 2 10 1- tiyati nāḷ Eḻurnāṭṭu sabhai yomum nāṭṭomum nakarattomum tiruvāraikkalt tiruppatiyil tirumalaimel Aruḷāḷaviṇṇakarāṉa Etirilipperumāḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumuṉpu Ikkoyil kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril varatar kaiyil nāṅkaḷ Utakam paṇṇik kuṭutta naṉceynilam kuṟṟūr nilam kāṇi kamaṉ nilam kāṇi Eḻur nilam kāṇi pavittiramāṇikkapuram nilam kāṇi viraṭṭāmaṅkalanilam kāṇi �ṟu nilam kāṇi centamaṅkalam nilam kāṇi vāṉavaṉmātevi
nilam kāṇi kalliyāṇi nilam kāṇi tāḻampāṭi nilam kāṇi vicāṇam nilam kāṇi Iṉnilam patiṉṉoru kāṇiyum Iṉnāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi tiruviḷakku Uṭalāka Utakam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Eḻurnāṭṭu sabhaiyomum nāṭṭomum nakarattomum . Itukku vilaṅkutal ce ṇṭāmākil muveḻu Irupattoru paṭi kālvaḻi yeḻacca maṟuvāṉ Ippaṭikkurumaṉiyil cirāmanampi Eḻuttu paḷḷi koṇṭāṉ Eḻuttu taṉma caṅkātiyil Aḻakapperumāḷ Eḻuttu tiruveṅkaṭattu nampi Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya piramarāyar Eḻuttu Eḻur cakkaravatti Eḻuttu pavittira māṇikkattu cilaiyaceṭṭikaḷ Eḻuttu koṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu kalliyāṇa cempiyataraiyar Eḻuttu
tumpaṅkuṟicciyil ceyyappaṉ Eḻuttu kūttāṭum tevar Aṇiyāṟṟu ceyyappaṉ Eḻuttu kānapakaiyil koṅkaveḷā ṭāmaṅkalattu ṭāūralattu patakkāppiḷḷai malaiyāṇṭāṉ Ivakaḷ kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉamaikku kuṟumpaṅ kuṟicciyil kūttāṭuntevar Eḻuttu nāyaṉār nallūril nāvi kaimāṭṭāṅkāṉa maikku ceyyappaṉ Eḻuttu māḻal periyapāli kai kānamaikku tar Eḻuttu ciṟumaṉṟar Eḻuttu nāṭṭūr paṇiyāl nāṭṭukkaṇakku periya Uṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
